display_text: Blast Rig. Tier N/A (Neutral Equipment): This item contains a Hair Trigger passive that automatically explodes when a hero attacks you within 400 range. The explosion deals 250 magical damage to all enemies within a 400 radius and causes them to miss 100% of their attacks for 2 seconds (Blind). It provides +7 Armor. The cooldown is 20 seconds. This item is designed for a defensive, counter-initiating playstyle, punishing aggressive melee attackers. Stats: CD: 20s, Blind Duration: 2s, Radius: 400, Damage: 250, Armor: +7.
